title: Stilton and Plush Pho
description: A rich and creamy take on traditional Vietnamese pho, featuring stilton cheese and plush noodles.
instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a simmer in a large pot.
Cook the plush noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small saucepan, heat the soy sauce and sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the ginger and garlic to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the stilton cheese until melted.
Add the cooked noodles to the cheese sauce and toss to combine.
Serve the noodles in bowls and garnish with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
Serve the broth on the side for dipping.
